channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: US-Iran delegations arrive as talks begin in Switzerland
item.description: US-Iran delegations arrive as talks begin in Switzerland.

item.title: Messi, Argentina play Austria in World Cup group match: All to know
item.description: Hat-trick hero Lionel Messi back in action for Argentina as they look to take a huge step towards the knockout stages.

item.title: Ukraine strikes hit oil facilities in Crimea, Russia’s Krasnodar
item.description: Crimea's Moscow-installed leader says four people killed in drone attack on the Russian-occupied Black Sea peninsula.

item.title: ‘Kind, principled’: Colleagues remember Gaza journalist killed by Israel
item.description: Ahmed Wishah is the 12th Al Jazeera journalist killed by Israel in Gaza since October 2023.

item.title: Stop ‘Greater Israel’ to make peace
item.description: Expansionist Israel will not stop dragging the US to war in the Middle East.

item.title: Lebanon’s ancient monuments remain at risk from Israeli attack
item.description: Lebanon’s ancient monuments remain at risk from Israeli attack

item.title: Mother of Al Jazeera’s Ahmed Wishah mourns his killing
item.description: This is the moment the mother of Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah first saw his body after Israel killed him in Gaza.

item.title: Albanian protesters rally against Kushner-backed resort in protected area
item.description: Demonstrators chant "Albania is not for sale," challenging coastal projects tied to Kushner amid environmental concerns.

item.title: Colombians to vote in presidential run-off pitting leftist against hardliner
item.description: Run-off election sees leftist Ivan Cepeda and far-right lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella vying for the presidency.

item.title: Protests in Albania against Kushner resort swell to tens of thousands
item.description: Albanians have gathered for the 21st day in a row to protest plans to build a resort on Albania's coast.

item.title: The deal with Iran may be imperfect but it is what the American people want
item.description: The Iran war has put the US in a difficult position, but Trump has made the most of it.

item.title: World Cup 2026 Day 11: Spain and Iran in action, predictions and schedule
item.description: Spain-Saudi Arabia, Belgium-Iran play on Sunday. Germany reach knockouts, and Curacao earn first point at a World Cup.

item.title: US-Iran talks in Switzerland: Is Lebanon top of agenda; who is attending?
item.description: Iran wants the US to pressure Israel to stop the war in Lebanon, which has reeled from renewed attacks.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 10: Netherlands thrash Sweden, Japan eliminate Tunisia
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: US and Iran face make-or-break talks in Switzerland
item.description: Iranian and US officials are set for high stakes talks in Switzerland to reinforce the Memorandum of Understanding.

item.title: Vance arrives in Switzerland for US-Iran talks
item.description: Both nations seek a durable end to their war as Iran slams Israeli attacks on Lebanon as violations of interim deal.

item.title: Iran war day 114: US, Iranian delegations in Switzerland for key talks
item.description: Lebanon to top the agenda as US and Iran to hold talks in Switzerland’s Burgenstock mediated by Qatar and Pakistan.

item.title: Ueda’s brace helps Japan knock Tunisia out of World Cup 2026
item.description: Two goals from Ayase Ueda, and one each from Daichi Kamada and Junya Ito, keep Asian giants Japan second in Group F.

item.title: Trump official says Iran World Cup visa approval ‘amazing’
item.description: The chief of the White House World Cup task force says it’s “pretty amazing” Iran’s football team has been given visas.

item.title: Which teams have qualified for the World Cup 2026 knockouts, round of 32?
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage format, criteria and rules for qualification. Find out who's in and who's out.

item.title: South Africa’s immigration crackdown divides Johannesburg’s inner city
item.description: A government push to curb undocumented employment is exposing the dependence of many small businesses on migrant labour.

item.title: Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah killed in targeted Israeli strike
item.description: Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah killed in targeted Israeli strike

item.title: Egypt coach denies Salah rift before World Cup match against New Zealand
item.description: 'If he starts ... or if he gets substituted, it's fine - it is his role as a player,' Egypt ‌coach Hossam Hassan says.

item.title: Room the hero as tiny Curacao earn first World Cup point against Ecuador
item.description: Eloy Room's incredible goalkeeping helped Curacao make history in a goalless draw in a Group E match in Kansas City.

item.title: Suspect arrested after anti-Muslim stabbing rampage in Scotland
item.description: Bystanders captured the moment police arrested a machete-weilding man, suspected of anti-Muslim stabbing rampage.
